# Test fixtures

Sample `.jdl` files for manual runs or future integration tests.

- `test_easy.jdl` – Basic syntax and output
- `test_medium.jdl` – Mid-level features
- `test_hard.jdl` – Advanced constructs
- `test_*_builtins.jdl` – Builtin coverage (list, string, core math)
- `test_dict.jdl` – Dict/map usage
- `test_list_comprehension.jdl` – List comprehensions

Run with: `jade tests/fixtures/test_easy.jdl` (from `jade-lang/`).
